weather._note: Weather works fine in the VM as long as it has internet.

apps.label: STREAMING
apps._note: Sign into demo.jellyfin.org/stable for a real test library. If you skip installing it, swap for the mpv line below.

apps.label: LIVE TV
apps._note: SMPTE color bars stand in for a live channel. apt install mpv

apps.label: MUSIC
apps._note: 440Hz tone proves audio + launch/kill work. Swap for feishin later.

apps.label: GAMING
command: echo 'pretend this is Steam Big Picture'; sleep 999
apps._note: Don't install Steam in the VM — pointless without the GPU. apt install foot
